drd_row.transformation:
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
join ccal_repl_owner.apa apa on apa.exec_id = t.txn_id
 
WHEN txn.src_stm_id = 5 (RJBNK1) and apa.ac_id is not null (NOTE: APA on ESP activity is always APACSH defined on [ETL Notes] tab)
THEN
left join ccsi_owner.ar_ac_subdim aas ON 
aas.ar_id = t.ar_id 
AND aas.dep_ac_setup_id = apa.ac_id
and aas.eff_dt <= t.td
and aas.end_dt > t.td
use aas.AC_NUM
ELSE
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
left join ccsi_owner.ar_dim ard ON ard.AR_ID = t.AR_ID
and ard.eff_dt <= t.td
and ard.end_dt > t.td
use ard.ORIG_SRC_STM_AR_ID

CASE    WHEN AP.SALE_CHRG_RATE_TP_ID = 2507 
            THEN AP.SALE_CHRG_RATE

drd_row.transformation:
If there is a record in CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP table with TXN.TXN_ID = TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID
and TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 (Cancel)
and TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID
then set to 'Y' for both TRGT_TXN_ID and SRC_TXN_ID.

The check should be performed each time when a new record is written into CCAL_REPL_OWNER.TXN_RLTNP with TXN_RLTNP_TP_ID = 69 and update the flag for both TRGT_TXN_ID and SRC_TXN_ID, if TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID.

Note: TXN_RLTNP.TRGT_TXN_ID <> TXN_RLTNP.SRC_TXN_ID is needed because it is possible that cancellation trade points to itself when the original trade that is being cancelled is not found. In this case Cancelled Flag should not be set to 'Y'
drd_row.notes:
[05/28/25]: Product Backlog Item 2030710: Populate new columns for trade and fee attributes for Activity

NOTE: This logic is different from TDS/DWH cancelled_flag. Lighthouse will have the flag set only for [cancellation trade + cancelled trade] pair, while TDS/DWH flag is also set for reversals and orphan cancels that don't point to initial trades

drd_row.logical_name: Cash Net New Asset Category ID
drd_row.transformation:
Use APACSH logic from 'ETL Notes' tab and below logic:
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
join ccal_repl_owner.apa ap ON ap.exec_id = t.txn_id
left join ccal_repl_owner.txn_avy_cl tac ON tac.txn_id = t.txn_id and tac.actv_f = 'Y' and ap.apa_id = tac.apa_id
left join ccal_repl_owner.avy_cl acl ON acl.avy_cl_id = tac.avy_cl_id
drd_row.notes:
[11/3/25]: Product Backlog Item 2218755: Add NNA Category columns to Activity Fact and Activity Detail Fact tables
Product Backlog Item 2218746: Populate NNA Category fields to Activity Fact and Activity Detail Fact tables
[1/28/26]: Corrected Source Table and Source Attribute Name for NNA categories to match with most recent DDL updates in CCAL
